zh.lifeSummary: 當Amice de Camville於1267年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾時，她的父親Geoffrey de Camville11264歲，母親Maud Brienne25歲。她於1281年6月1日與Sir Henry De La Pomeroy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年2月在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Amice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Amice de Camville was born in 1267, in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey de Camville, was 11264 and her mother, Maud Brienne, was 25. She married Sir Henry De La Pomeroy on 1 June 1281. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in February 1340, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amice de Camville est née en 1267, à Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Camville, avait 11264 ans et sa mère, Maud Brienne, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry De La Pomeroy le 1 juin 1281. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en février 1340, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amice de Camville 1267 in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Camville 11264 und ihre Mutter Maud Brienne 25. Sie hat am 1. Juni 1281 Sir Henry De La Pomeroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Februar 1340 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amice de Camville è nata il nel 1267 nel Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Geoffrey de Camville, aveva 11264 anni e sua madre, Maud Brienne, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry De La Pomeroy il 1 giugno 1281. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel febbraio 1340, nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Amice de Camvilleが1267年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン カンプヴィルで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Camvilleは11264歳，母Maud Brienneは25歳であった。1281年6月1日にSir Henry De La Pomeroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年2月にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amice de Camville(이)가 1267년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 캠p빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Camville(은)는 11264세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Brienne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1281년 6월 1일 Sir Henry De La Pomeroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Henry De La Pomeroy em 1 de junho de 1281. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1340, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amice de Camville родилась в 1267 г. в местности клифтон кампвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Camville было 11264 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Brienne, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry De La Pomeroy 1 июня 1281 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла февраль 1340 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
